versions.version_description: No capo. Original key. Song Info and YouTube link. Analyzed chords and bass notes thoroughly. Better suited for keys and bass than version 1.

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.version_description: This is an arrangement for a single guitar accompaniment with all the modulations back and forth from C Major up to A Major . The vocal melody along with embellishments are also shown here.

recommended.song_name: I Could Easily Fall In Love With You
When You Say Nothing At All
When The Girl In Your Arms

content:
"We Don't Talk Anymore" (Capo: 3rd. fret)

____Intro:

 [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Amaj9[/ch]  [ch]Amaj9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] 
 [ch]Amaj9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Amaj9[/ch]  [ch]Bm/A[/ch] (Repeat)

____Verse: 1

[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
 Used to think that life was sweet,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]C#m[/ch]
 used to think we were so complete[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
 I can't believe you'd throw it away[/tab]

____Verse: 2

[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
 Used to feel we had it made,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]C#m[/ch]
 used to feel we could sail away[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
 can you imagine how I feel today[/tab]

____Bridge: 1

[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
 Well, it seems a long time ago[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]/[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]/[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
 you were the lonely one[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]
 now it comes to letting go[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]/[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]/[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
 you are the on____ly one[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E6[/ch]
 do you know what you've got[/tab]

____Chorus: 
 
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Amaj9[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Amaj9[/ch]
 It's so funny how[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Amaj9[/ch] [ch]Bm/A[/ch]
 we don't talk anymore[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Amaj9[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Amaj9[/ch]
 It's so funny why[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Amaj9[/ch] [ch]Bm/A[/ch]
 we don't talk anymore[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]D/A[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 but I ain't losing sleep,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]A/E[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]B/F#[/ch]  [ch]B/F#[/ch]
 and I ain't counting sheep[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#maj7[/ch]                       [ch]G#m7[/ch]/[ch]F#[/ch]
 It's so funny how we don't ta__lk anymore[/tab]

[tab] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Amaj9[/ch]  [ch]Amaj9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]

[tab] [ch]Amaj9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Amaj9[/ch]  [ch]Bm/A[/ch] (Repeat)
___________we don't talk[/tab]

____Verse: 3

[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
 Well, it really doesn't matter to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                         [ch]C#m[/ch]
 I guess you're leaving was meant to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
 it's down to you now, you wanna be free[/tab]

____Bridge: 2

[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]F#m[/ch]
 Well I hope you know which way to go,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]/[ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]/[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]

[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]
